options.name: --stdin
options.description: Read template string from StdIn

options.name: --help
options.description: Show this message and exit

options.name: --fixedPath
options.description:
Override path to structure.xml relative to
executable (default="Env:\FixedPath")

options.name: --substitutionPath
options.description:
Path to substition file, relative to executable. (
default="substitutions.xml")

options.name: --databaseName
options.description:
The name of the database to be deployed, assumes
that the process is running on the destination
server. Requires the deployFrom option. Can
optionally provide the databaseRepository option.

options.name: --connectionString
options.description:
The connection string for the database to be
deployed, Requires the deployFrom option. Can
optionally provide the databaseRepository option.

options.name: --databaseRepository
options.description:
The entry to be made in the repository field in
the RoundhousE version table. If not provided
defaults to an empty string. NOTE! Ignored if
databaseName is not provided.

options.name: --databaseCommandTimeout
options.description:
Database Command Timeout period in seconds. If not
provided defaults to a set value or 30s if not
set.

options.name: --deployTo
options.description:
Path to deploy to. Required for the copyTo &
replace option, multiple values can be specified.

options.name: --deployFrom
options.description:
Path to deploy from. Required for the copyTo &
replace and databaseName options

options.name: --copyTo
options.description:
Add the contents of the deployFrom directory to
the deployTo directories, replacing files with
the same name

options.name: --replace
options.description:
Replace the current contents of the deployTo
directories

options.name: --updateConfig
options.description: Update config

options.name: --outputFailureContext
options.description: Output Failure Context

options.name: --quiet
options.description:
Turn off logging output (default=False, but always
True if -i set)

options.name: --treatAsTemplateFilter
options.description:
File filter for files in the deploy from directory
to treat as templates. These will be updated
after config and before deployment.

options.name: --warnOnOneTimeScriptChanges
options.description:
If one-time-scripts have had changes, only treat
them as warnings, not as errors. Defaults to
False.

options.name: --withTransaction
options.description:
Execute RoundhousE in transactional mode. Defaults
to True.

options.name: --roundhouseOutputPath
options.description:
Specify a directory for RoundhousE to store SQL
files. Defaults to E:\RH\

options.name: --dropDatabase
options.description:
Drop database, useful if you need to test
installations on a fresh database or need
control of databases for performance/load tests.

options.name: --dropDatabaseConfirm
options.description:
Drop database Confirmation, used to confirm that
database is to be dropped (for safety)

options.name: --deployReports
options.description:
Deploy Reporting service reports. See
reportVariable help for example usage.

options.name: --deployReportingRole
options.description:
Deploy Reporting service role for User. See
reportVariable help for example usage.

options.name: --reportVariable
options.description:
Deploy either reports (.rdl files) or add a role
to a local/domain user.
Both options requires Reporting Service
Variables (--rsv). multiple values can (and must)
be specified.
